doc_title_en: Notice Regarding Results of Treasury Stock Acquisition via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3) and Completion of Treasury Stock Acquisition

key_facts.reason_jp: 資本効率の向上及び機動的な資本政策を遂行するため

summary_en: Mandarake completed acquisition of 2,100 treasury shares via ToSTNeT-3 on May [date], concluding its announced buyback program.
summary_jp: まんだらけが5月にToSTNeT-3経由で2,100株を取得し、自己株式買付を完了した。

summary_en: まんだらけ authorized a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: まんだらけが自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。
tag_jp: 自社株買い・詳細確認中
